creator: ddrinnon@cdor.net
text: Would it be possible to build the 5.20.1.34 Patch against the current mono in lang/mono?  The Patch is for 5.10.1.57_2 while the port in the ports tree is at 5.10.1.57_3.  Thanks!  I'll be happy to test the patches - I run an OpenSimulator  Grid on 25 VMs on VMWare.
